title: Marketing site delivered without contact form or CMS access
question: Should the payee (Larkfield Studio) be paid the final $1,800 milestone under the linked terms?

evidence.label: Signed statement of work listing the five required deliverables
Screenshots of the live site showing no working contact form
Email thread where the client requests CMS login and the developer does not provide one
Hosting export confirming the contact form endpoint returns a 404

terms: On April 2, 2026, Marrow Coffee Co. agreed to pay Larkfield Studio $1,800 for a five-page marketing website. The statement of work lists five deliverables: responsive layout, five page templates, basic SEO tags, a working contact form that emails submissions to hello@marrowcoffee.test, and CMS access so staff can edit page text without a developer. The final milestone releases only when all five deliverables are present and functioning on the production domain. The first three items shipped and work.
